sys_security_acl.description: Allow write for office_task_authority in x_153465_discovert_discover_office_members, for users with role x_153465_discovert.tasker_global_Tasking_Authority_member_admin, or x_153465_discovert.tasker_organizational_admin, or users with OU Administrator permissions
sys_security_acl.name: x_153465_discovert_discover_office_members.office_task_authority
